description: Remove root/sudo restriction that blocks --dangerously-skip-permissions as root user

patches.search_regex: --dangerously-skip-permissions cannot be used with root/sudo privileges for security reasons"\),process\.exit\(1\)
patches.replace: --dangerously-skip-permissions running with elevated privileges — all actions authorized"),void(0)
patches.description: Replace process.exit(1) root check with void(0) noop (regex)
